003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.

015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.part;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
021
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.function.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.http.*;
026
027/**
028 * A mutable, ordered list of {@link HttpPart} instances.
029 *
030 * <p>
031 * Mirrors the semantics of {@code PartList} from {@code juneau-rest-common-classic} without the
032 * Apache HttpCore dependency. Part-name comparisons are case-sensitive by default (matching the
033 * classic default for parts; headers use case-insensitive comparisons).
034 *
035 * <p>
036 * Use {@link PartList} when you need an immutable list bound to an HTTP body (e.g.
037 * {@code application/x-www-form-urlencoded}); use {@code HttpPartList} when you need a mutable
038 * builder for default form data / query parameter lists.
039 *
040 * <p>
041 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
042 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}). It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in
043 * the <b>next major</b> Juneau release (and possibly earlier).
044 *
045 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
046 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
047 * </ul>
048 *
049 * @since 10.0.0
050 */
051@SuppressWarnings({
052   "java:S2160" // equals() inherited from ArrayList; list equality is element-based which is correct
053})
054public class HttpPartList extends ArrayList<HttpPart> {
055
056   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
057
058   /** Represents no part list in annotations. */
059   public static final class Void extends HttpPartList {
060      private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;
061   }
062
063   private boolean caseInsensitive;
064
065   /**
066    * Creates a new empty {@link HttpPartList}.
067    *
068    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
069    */
070   public static HttpPartList create() {
071      return new HttpPartList();
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Creates a new {@link HttpPartList} initialized with the given parts.
076    *
077    * @param parts The parts to include. {@code null} entries are ignored.
078    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
079    */
080   public static HttpPartList of(HttpPart...parts) {
081      return new HttpPartList().append(parts);
082   }
083
084   /**
085    * Creates a new {@link HttpPartList} initialized with the given parts.
086    *
087    * @param parts The parts to include. {@code null} entries are ignored.
088    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
089    */
090   public static HttpPartList of(List<HttpPart> parts) {
091      return new HttpPartList().append(parts);
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Creates a new {@link HttpPartList} initialized with the given alternating {@code name}/{@code value} pairs.
096    *
097    * @param pairs Alternating name/value strings. Must be an even number.
098    * @return A new instance. Never <jk>null</jk>.
099    * @throws IllegalArgumentException If the number of arguments is odd.
100    */
101   public static HttpPartList ofPairs(String...pairs) {
102      var x = new HttpPartList();
103      if (pairs == null)
104         pairs = new String[0];
105      assertArg(pairs.length % 2 == 0, "Odd number of parameters passed into HttpPartList.ofPairs()");
106      for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i += 2)
107         x.add(HttpPartBean.of(pairs[i], pairs[i + 1]));
108      return x;
109   }
110
111   /** Constructor. */
112   public HttpPartList() {
113      super();
114   }
115
116   /**
117    * Copy constructor.
118    *
119    * @param copyFrom The list to copy. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
120    */
121   protected HttpPartList(HttpPartList copyFrom) {
122      super(copyFrom);
123      this.caseInsensitive = copyFrom.caseInsensitive;
124   }
125
126   /**
127    * Sets whether part-name comparisons are case-insensitive. Defaults to {@code false} (case-sensitive).
128    *
129    * @param value New value.
130    * @return This object.
131    */
132   public HttpPartList caseInsensitive(boolean value) {
133      this.caseInsensitive = value;
134      return this;
135   }
136
137   /**
138    * Appends the given part.
139    *
140    * @param value The part to add. {@code null} is ignored.
141    * @return This object.
142    */
143   public HttpPartList append(HttpPart value) {
144      if (value != null)
145         add(value);
146      return this;
147   }
148
149   /**
150    * Appends the given parts in order.
151    *
152    * @param values The parts to add. {@code null} entries are ignored.
153    * @return This object.
154    */
155   public HttpPartList append(HttpPart...values) {
156      if (values != null)
157         for (var v : values)
158            append(v);
159      return this;
160   }
161
162   /**
163    * Appends the given parts in order.
164    *
165    * @param values The parts to add. {@code null} entries are ignored.
166    * @return This object.
167    */
168   public HttpPartList append(List<HttpPart> values) {
169      if (values != null)
170         values.forEach(this::append);
171      return this;
172   }
173
174   /**
175    * Appends a part constructed from the given name and string value.
176    *
177    * @param name The part name.
178    * @param value The part value.
179    * @return This object.
180    */
181   public HttpPartList append(String name, String value) {
182      return append(HttpPartBean.of(name, value));
183   }
184
185   /**
186    * Sets the given part as a default. If a part with the same name already exists, this is a no-op
187    * (first-in-chain wins per name).
188    *
189    * @param value The part to set. {@code null} is ignored.
190    * @return This object.
191    */
192   public HttpPartList setDefault(HttpPart value) {
193      if (value != null && !contains(value.getName()))
194         add(value);
195      return this;
196   }
197
198   /**
199    * Sets the given parts as defaults, in order. For each, if a part with the same name already exists,
200    * the entry is skipped (first-in-chain wins per name).
201    *
202    * @param values The parts to set. {@code null} entries are ignored.
203    * @return This object.
204    */
205   public HttpPartList setDefault(HttpPart...values) {
206      if (values != null)
207         for (var v : values)
208            setDefault(v);
209      return this;
210   }
211
212   /**
213    * Sets a default part with the given name and value (first-in-chain wins per name).
214    *
215    * @param name The part name.
216    * @param value The part value.
217    * @return This object.
218    */
219   public HttpPartList setDefault(String name, String value) {
220      return setDefault(HttpPartBean.of(name, value));
221   }
222
223   /**
224    * Sets the given part, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
225    *
226    * @param value The part to set. {@code null} is ignored.
227    * @return This object.
228    */
229   public HttpPartList set(HttpPart value) {
230      if (value == null)
231         return this;
232      removeAll(value.getName());
233      add(value);
234      return this;
235   }
236
237   /**
238    * Sets the given parts, each replacing any prior entry with the same name.
239    *
240    * @param values The parts to set. {@code null} entries are ignored.
241    * @return This object.
242    */
243   public HttpPartList set(HttpPart...values) {
244      if (values != null)
245         for (var v : values)
246            set(v);
247      return this;
248   }
249
250   /**
251    * Sets a part with the given name and value, replacing any prior entry with the same name.
252    *
253    * @param name The part name.
254    * @param value The part value.
255    * @return This object.
256    */
257   public HttpPartList set(String name, String value) {
258      return set(HttpPartBean.of(name, value));
259   }
260
261   /**
262    * Removes all parts with the given name.
263    *
264    * @param name The part name.
265    * @return This object.
266    */
267   public HttpPartList removeAll(String name) {
268      assertArgNotNull("name", name);
269      removeIf(p -> nameMatches(p, name));
270      return this;
271   }
272
273   /**
274    * Returns {@code true} if a part with the given name is present.
275    *
276    * @param name The part name.
277    * @return {@code true} if present.
278    */
279   public boolean contains(String name) {
280      return stream().anyMatch(p -> nameMatches(p, name));
281   }
282
283   /**
284    * Returns the first part with the given name, or {@code null} if absent.
285    *
286    * @param name The part name.
287    * @return The first matching part, or {@code null}.
288    */
289   public HttpPart getFirst(String name) {
290      return stream().filter(p -> nameMatches(p, name)).findFirst().orElse(null);
291   }
292
293   /**
294    * Returns the last part with the given name, or {@code null} if absent.
295    *
296    * @param name The part name.
297    * @return The last matching part, or {@code null}.
298    */
299   public HttpPart getLast(String name) {
300      HttpPart last = null;
301      for (var p : this)
302         if (nameMatches(p, name))
303            last = p;
304      return last;
305   }
306
307   /**
308    * Returns all parts with the given name in insertion order.
309    *
310    * @param name The part name.
311    * @return A new list of matching parts. Never <jk>null</jk>.
312    */
313   public List<HttpPart> getAll(String name) {
314      return stream().filter(p -> nameMatches(p, name)).toList();
315   }
316
317   /**
318    * Returns all parts in this list as a typed array.
319    *
320    * @return A new array. Never <jk>null</jk>.
321    */
322   public HttpPart[] getAll() {
323      return toPartArray();
324   }
325
326   /**
327    * Performs an action on each part whose name matches.
328    *
329    * @param name The part name.
330    * @param action The action.
331    * @return This object.
332    */
333   public HttpPartList forEach(String name, Consumer<HttpPart> action) {
334      for (var p : this)
335         if (nameMatches(p, name))
336            action.accept(p);
337      return this;
338   }
339
340   /**
341    * Returns a copy of this list.
342    *
343    * @return A new copy. Never <jk>null</jk>.
344    */
345   public HttpPartList copy() {
346      return new HttpPartList(this);
347   }
348
349   /**
350    * Returns the parts in this list as a typed array.
351    *
352    * @return A new array. Never <jk>null</jk>.
353    */
354   public HttpPart[] toPartArray() {
355      return toArray(new HttpPart[0]);
356   }
357
358   private boolean nameMatches(HttpPart p, String name) {
359      return caseInsensitive ? eqic(p.getName(), name) : eq(p.getName(), name);
360   }
361}
